notes:
NovaPanel v0.7.29

- Replaced PowerShell Expand-Archive with native Node ZIP extractor. v0.7.28 evidence proved Expand-Archive truncates resources/app.asar to 0 bytes despite the ZIP entry being valid (CD reports uncompressed size 866773, on-disk size after extract 0). New extractZipToDir walks central directory entries, seeks to each local file header, reads compressed bytes, decompresses via zlib.inflateRawSync (method 8 deflate) or copies directly (method 0 stored), verifies per-entry size parity (writeBuf.length == uncompressed size from CD), writes to destDir preserving directory structure. Path traversal guard refuses entries that resolve outside destDir.
- ZIP64 size/offset escape sentinels handled. Directory-only entries (filenames ending /) create the directory. Unsupported compression methods throw. inspectZipEntries pre-extract gate unchanged - if ZIP itself is bad, extract still fails before write.
- extract-integrity logging preserved verbatim. PHASE FAIL behavior preserved. contentRoot / nested-root detection (findContentRoot) preserved. extraction method log line now reads node-native (zlib.inflateRawSync) instead of PowerShell Expand-Archive.
- No changes to copy / verify / relaunch / deep-link / release / build pipeline.
